reason: An everyman’s crisis leads to discovering his worth and community’s boundless support.
An earnest lawyer fights for justice in a case that inspires empathy and hope.
A pig’s innocent kindness heals hearts and bridges every divide.
A fragile faith in a boy’s voice brings a town together in unexpected compassion.
A grieving widower’s guidance brings peace and purpose beyond the grave.
A lion cub’s perseverance and a father’s unwavering love shine bright.
A dog’s loyalty turns a perilous journey into a testament of devotion.
A janitor’s quiet genius and pure heart transform everyone around him.
An Iowa farmer’s dream unites spirits and proves miracles happen.
Gentle brotherly care and simple love endure against all odds.
